testability_note: Tests pair-specific hold thresholds; actual hold not controlled hold — proxy only
testable_rule: (pair in ('GBPUSD=X', 'GBPUSD') and hold <= 6) or (pair in ('AUDUSD=X', 'AUDUSD') and hold <= 5) or (pair in ('EURUSD=X', 'EURUSD') and hold <= 5) or (pair in ('AUDNZD=X', 'AUDNZD') and hold <= 7) or (pair in ('GBPJPY=X',) and hold <= 5)
